name: io.github.salahawad/outlook-personal-mcp
title: Outlook Personal MCP
description: MCP server for a personal Outlook.com mailbox and calendar via the Microsoft Graph API. Supports reading, sending, and organizing mail; managing drafts with attachments; calendar events (create/update/delete/respond); and free/busy availability checks. Uses per-user device-code OAuth — credentials never leave your machine.

environmentVariables.name: OUTLOOK_MCP_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Azure App Registration client ID (Application ID). Required. Create a free app at https://portal.azure.com — see README for the three-minute setup.

environmentVariables.name: OUTLOOK_MCP_AUTHORITY
environmentVariables.description: Azure AD authority URL. Defaults to https://login.microsoftonline.com/consumers which covers personal Microsoft accounts (Outlook.com, Hotmail, Live). Change only if you target a different tenant.

environmentVariables.name: OUTLOOK_MCP_ALLOW_PERMANENT_DELETE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable the permanent_delete tool which irrecoverably erases messages (bypasses Deleted Items). Disabled by default for safety.

environmentVariables.name: OUTLOOK_MCP_DEBUG
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable debug-level logging for Graph API requests and responses.
